code:
type Obj = Record<string, unknown>

const isPlain = (v: unknown): v is Obj =>
  !!v && typeof v === "object" && !Array.isArray(v) && Object.getPrototypeOf(v) === Object.prototype

const deepMerge = (t: Obj, s: Obj): Obj =>
  Object.keys({ ...t, ...s }).reduce((acc, k) => {
    const tv = t[k], sv = s[k]
    acc[k] = isPlain(tv) && isPlain(sv)
      ? deepMerge(tv, sv)
      : Array.isArray(tv) && Array.isArray(sv)
        ? [...tv, ...sv]
        : k in s ? sv : tv
    return acc
  }, {} as Obj)

export default deepMerge
// @stance: minimal
